about.label: Greenprod Sustainable
about.title: Who We Are

history.title: Our History
history.text: Greenprod Sustainable was born with the conviction that productivity and caring for the environment can go hand in hand. We are a company focused on driving agricultural and marine productivity through innovative practices, producing organic fertilizers and generating value in seafood products to improve the quality of life of local communities.

missionVision.title: Mission and Vision
missionVision.missionText: To drive agricultural and marine productivity through innovative and environmentally friendly practices, producing organic fertilizers and seafood products that improve the quality of life of local communities.
missionVision.visionText: To be a leading company in the production of agricultural bio-inputs and sustainable seafood products, recognized for our innovation, environmental commitment, and contribution to responsible agriculture and fishing that promote healthy ecosystems.

interventionAxes.label: What We Do
interventionAxes.title: Our Intervention Axes
interventionAxes.subtitle: Three lines of action that generate real impact on agriculture, fishing, and sustainable business development.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide each of our decisions and projects.
values.sustainabilityDesc: Unbreakable commitment to the environment and local communities.
values.innovationDesc: Constant search for bio-inputs and productive methods that exceed conventional standards.
values.qualityDesc: Safety, efficacy, and accessibility in every product and service we deliver.
values.responsibilityDesc: Transparency, ethics, and fair payment in all our business relationships and with fishermen.

agricultureItems: Organic fertilizers and biocontrol agents (gp-biol, gp-trich)

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To drive agricultural and marine productivity through innovative and environmentally friendly practices, producing organic fertilizers and seafood products that improve the quality of life of local communities.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be a leading company in the production of agricultural bio-inputs and sustainable seafood products, recognized for our innovation, environmental commitment, and contribution to responsible agriculture and fishing that improve the quality of life of local communities and promote healthy ecosystems.

sustainability.title: Commitment to Sustainability
sustainability.subtitle: Concrete initiatives that demonstrate our leadership in environmental responsibility

highlight.title: We produce without compromising the
highlight.description: At Green Prod & Sustainable, every product and service is designed to close the production cycle, minimize waste and regenerate ecosystems. We don't just produce; we build a business model that respects and enhances nature.
items: Sustainable Agriculture: bio-inputs, organic fertilizers and technical advice
Responsible Fishing: fresh fish and value-added seafood products
Integral Consulting: business plans, training and competitive funds

circular.description: Utilization of 95% of by-products through sustainable valorization and transformation processes

renewable.description: 60% of our operations run on solar energy and certified renewable sources

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Testimonials from companies that trust our sustainable solutions

testimonial1.name: Carlos Mendoza
testimonial1.text: Green Prod & Sustainable S.A.C has been a fundamental strategic partner. Their bio-inputs have improved our productivity by 30% while reducing environmental impact. The quality and service are exceptional.

testimonial2.name: María Fernández
testimonial2.text: The traceability and certifications of their products allow us to meet the highest ESG standards. Their commitment to the circular economy is a key differentiator in our supply chain.

testimonial3.name: Roberto Silva
testimonial3.text: We have been working with Green Prod for 5 years and the consistency in quality is impressive. Their sustainable procurement solutions have opened new demanding international markets for us.
